title: Tapping for Abundance Through the Family Line
subtitle: A tapping practice for releasing generational money anxiety and beginning a new pattern
excerpt: A five-minute tapping practice from Day 60 of a 12-week money program. The script targets the fear of passing money stress on to children, and the weight of carrying financial anxiety that arrived before you. The reframe moves toward abundance as something that ripples forward through family, not backward.
sourceNotes: The tapping framework is Gary Craig's Emotional Freedom Technique (EFT), in use since the mid-1990s. The script is adapted from Day 60 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program to Attract Cash, Overflow & Abundance Without Hustle or Burnout (Rebecca J Page, 2025, ISBN 9798268793796).

practice.whenToUse: Use when you notice yourself worrying about whether your children or family members will inherit financial anxiety, or when you feel the weight of money stress that started before you.

content.text: A five-minute tapping practice from Day 60 of a 12-week money program. The script targets two things: the fear of providing too little for children, and the weight of carrying financial anxiety that has its roots in an earlier generation. The reframe moves toward abundance rippling forward — a new normal of financial ease, started here.
New to tapping? Read
how EFT tapping works
first.
The practice
Karate chop
Even though I once feared I couldn't provide enough, I deeply and completely accept myself.
Even though I worried money stress would pass to my children, I deeply and completely accept myself.
Even though I've carried generational anxiety about money, I deeply and completely accept myself.
Tapping round
Eyebrow: I want my children to feel safe with money.
Side of eye: I want ease to be their normal.
Under eye: I release old family struggle.
Under nose: I end the cycle of fear and scarcity.
Chin: I replace it with freedom and calm.
Collarbone: I feel proud of this shift.
Under arm: I love giving them a different start.
Top of head: I let abundance ripple through our line.
Reframe to positive
Eyebrow: My wealth blesses my whole family.
Side of eye: I show them that money can be peaceful.
Under eye: I pass down confidence and ease.
Under nose: I build a foundation for those who come after me.
Chin: I enjoy seeing them thrive without worry.
Collarbone: I create a new normal of plenty.
Under arm: I love knowing they will live with ease.
Top of head: Abundance flows through our family tree.
Tap each round three times, then move to the reframe and tap that three times.
Where this practice comes from

The tapping framework is Gary Craig's Emotional Freedom Technique (EFT), developed in the mid-1990s from Roger Callahan's Thought Field Therapy. The script is adapted from Day 60 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
